text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since sitting down at my desk to craft a new
training regimen for <chrname>, the
last few hours have flown by. I'm about to take a
break when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Are you there, Trainer? It's Tazuna. You have a
visitor. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: It's Etsuko Otonashi from Twinkle Monthly. Would you happen to be available to talk at the moment?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you working? I'm sorry to disturb you.
choice_data_list:
Yes, I was just thinking up a new training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
A training regimen? Um, if you don't mind, may I
take a look?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Pardon me...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... Hm, I see. Amazing... Oh, but this is...
Hmm!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you once again. That was truly
fascinating!
choice_data_list: I'd like to hear your opinion on it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Mine? But I'm just a reporter. I'm not sure my
thoughts would be especially insightful...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What an amazing attitude to have! Absorbing
anything and everything you can, almost like an
insatiable black hole...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Then, with all due respect, I think it may prove
beneficial to reconsider the shape of the cleats
you've chosen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
With this running form, I think using outer-rim
type cleats will alleviate some of the burden on
the runner.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Also, it seems to me that stamina often becomes
a point of concern for runners around this time in
their careers.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And going off your most recent lap times, it might
serve you well to increase your number of ramp
training sessions...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...That's all I have to note. It's only a layman's
opinion, but I hope it can be of help in some small
way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She certainly has a lot to say, and her
observations are all incredibly insightful!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I always knew you were knowledgeable about
racing, but you're a veritable wellspring of
wisdom, Reporter Otonashi!
choice_data_list: You could become a trainer yourself.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored to hear that... But I'm quite happy
being a reporter.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: If I weren't a reporter, I...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Don't you need to discuss the magazines,
Reporter Otonashi?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah! I'm terribly sorry! It's unlike me to forget
my priorities!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to take a look at these magazines and
let me know what you think of the
announcements for the Twinkle Star Climax!
choice_data_list: Ah, was wondering what was in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There sure are a lot. And not just racing
magazines either—there are Umamusume fashion
and manga magazines, too.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Right! And physical publications are only a small
fraction of the whole picture—we've written
feature articles for websites, too.
choice_data_list:
All this and you're saying it's just a small
fraction?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I was utterly taken aback as well!
choice_data_list:
It really makes the scale of this event hit home,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
If only I could redirect your kind comments to the
many companies who agreed to pitch in and help!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
However, we still have plenty more gas in the
tank. The opening day of the series is still a ways
away...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And we're hoping to use that time for further
promotion. I want to create the grandest racing
event—one that every citizen will await with
bated breath!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Well, this series is going to determine the
greatest, after all! I want to learn from your
example, Trainer
<username>, and devote
myself fully to this cause!
choice_data_list: So I'm fully devoting myself to it as well?
So I'm fully devoting myself to it as well?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Naturally! ...Oop, look at the time!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
My schedule is packed with meetings for this
project, so I need to get back to the office right
away. Thank you for your time today!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There she goes. She blows in and out of here like
a whirlwind...
choice_data_list: I hear you on that one...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, by the way, have you seen this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna hands me a magazine. Among the lineup
of features covering powerhouse runners is an
article on <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
These are the top contenders for the title of
"greatest." ...What do you think?
choice_data_list: To be honest, I'm ecstatic. But...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But?
choice_data_list:
One day, I want to see an entire issue dedicated
to her!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! I know how you feel, though. An article
this small does leave a little to be desired.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Special Issue on <chrname>, the
Greatest Umamusume! Hehe, I look forward to
reading that someday. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure <chrname> will emerge from
this series as more than a mere contender.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During our training session later that day, I'm
bursting with even more motivation than usual!
